article.title: Arm, SoftBank Tried to Buy Cerebras in 11th Hour
article.summary: Arm Holdings Plc and majority owner SoftBank Group Corp. made an approach to acquire Cerebras Systems Inc., the AI computing firm, weeks before its expected initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.
article.title_zh: Arm、SoftBank 試圖在最後時刻收購 Cerebras
article.summary_zh: Arm Holdings Plc 和多數股東 SoftBank Group Corp. 在 AI 計算公司 Cerebras Systems Inc. 預期首次公開募股前數週進行了收購洽談。

article.title: NEC closes CSG acquisition
article.summary: NEC has closed its acquisition of CSG Systems, a billing and customer care specialist that counts Comcast among its tier 1 customers. Netcracker, an NEC subsidiary, will now lead the combined business. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: NEC 完成 CSG 收購
article.summary_zh: NEC 已完成對計費和客戶服務專家 CSG Systems 的收購，該公司的客戶包括 Comcast 等一級客戶，NEC 子公司 Netcracker 將領導合併後的業務。

article.title: Louis Rossmann taunts Bambu Lab by hosting banned 3D Printer firmware fork, dares $1 billion company to sue him — more creators pledge support and boycotts, Snapmaker donates equipment to embattled developer
article.summary: Louis Rossmann posted yet another YouTube video taunting the 3D printing juggernaut into taking legal action. In the video, he stated the contentious fork of OrcaSlicer-BambuLab was now hosted on his own FULU (Freedom from Unethical Limitations) Foundation GitHub.
article.title_zh: Louis Rossmann 通過託管被禁 3D 列印機韌體分支來戲弄 Bambu Lab，敢於向 10 億美元公司發起訴訟挑戰 — 更多創作者承諾支援和抵制，Snapmaker 向陷入困境的開發者捐贈設備
article.summary_zh: Louis Rossmann 發佈了另一段 YouTube 影片，戲弄 3D 列印業界巨頭提起法律訴訟。在影片中，他宣佈有爭議的 OrcaSlicer-BambuLab 分支現已託管在他自己的 FULU（Freedom from Unethical Limitations）Foundation GitHub 上。

article.title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
article.summary: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.
article.title_zh: Origin Lab 融資 800 萬美元，幫助視頻遊戲公司向世界模型開發者銷售數據
article.summary_zh: Origin Lab 將充當市場平台，讓 AI 實驗室購買高質量的授權數據，視頻遊戲公司可以在其中銷售數據。

article.title: Why Vision LLMs Force A Rethink Of Edge AI Hardware
article.summary: As vision-centric large language models move on-device, performance measured in raw TOPS is no longer enough. Architectures need to be built around real workloads, memory behavior, and sustained utilization, especially at the edge. Vision LLMs are changing the edge AI equation For the last decade, most edge AI silicon has been built to do one job extremely well: run convolutional networks for image classification, detection, and basic segmentation. That design point is becoming less sufficient as multimodal models move from research into commercial edge systems. Vision LLMs fuse perception, semantics, and reasoning in a single pipeline. They can understand scenes, answer questions about what they see, summarize events across time, and increasingly help determine what to do next. Cameras, v
article.title_zh: 為什麼 Vision LLMs 強制重新思考邊緣 AI 硬體

article.title: Microsoft launches Cloud‑Initiated Driver Recovery for remote rollback of faulty updates — no user action or OEM intervention will be needed to handle broken drivers delivered via Windows Update
article.summary: Microsoft introduces Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery, an important Windows reliability change designed to minimize buggy driver mayhem.
article.title_zh: Microsoft 推出雲端啟動驅動程式復原功能，可遠端回滾故障更新 — 無需使用者操作或 OEM 介入即可處理 Windows Update 傳送的有問題驅動程式
article.summary_zh: Microsoft 推出 Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery，這是一項重要的 Windows 可靠性改進，旨在最小化有問題驅動程式的影響。

article.title: Red Hat’s skill packs give AI agents something a bigger model never could: 20 years of institutional memory
article.summary: Red Hat believes giving users access to agent skills will be AI’s next inflection point.  At the Red Hat Summit this week in Atlanta, Red Hat announced its new dedicated AI skills repository . Why the focus on skills? In his keynote, Matt Hicks , Red Hat’s President and CEO, explains that “We have deployed generative AI to every organization in the company. Each organization is looking for ways to either drive more efficiency for themselves or create more value for its customers. “For example, you might have heard of or used Ask Red Hat, our interactive chatbot. It now runs on our Customer Support Portal. This chatbot has been trained on over two decades of Red Hat support information, knowledge base, and work capabilities.”   “This chatbo
article.title_zh: Red Hat 的技能包給 AI 代理帶來了更大模型永遠無法提供的東西：20 年的機構記憶
article.summary_zh: Red Hat 在 Summit 上宣佈了新的專屬 AI 技能儲存庫，認為讓用戶存取代理技能將是 AI 的下一個拐點。

article.title: Anthropic’s Claude Code agent view is a better dashboard. So why aren’t developers convinced?
article.summary: This week, Anthropic announced agent view in Claude Code, a CLI dashboard that lets developers manage multiple Claude Code sessions from a single screen.  Where running parallel agents used to require managing multiple terminal tabs and a tmux grid (not to mention the taxing mental load of keeping track of it all), Anthropic’s new product purports to give developers a one-stop shop for Claude Code session management.  With the agent view, developers can launch new agents, send them to the background, and easily jump between different sessions to reply inline or attach a full conversation. Status indicators show which sessions are running, which are waiting for input, and which have produced a pull request (PR).  But while a concise interface is a nice-to-have, it still
article.title_zh: Anthropic 的 Claude Code 代理檢視是更好的儀表板。那麼為什麼開發人員不信服呢？
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 本週宣佈了 Claude Code 的 agent view，這是一個 CLI 儀表板，讓開發人員能從單一螢幕管理多個 Claude Code 工作階段。

article.title: Why agent harnesses fail inside cloud-native systems
article.summary: Coding agents perform better with a harness that gives them the tools, guidance, and feedback signals to know what to do, how to do it, and how to know if it works. In cloud-native systems, providing the feedback component is less straightforward. I’ve been sitting with Addy Osmani’s recent post on agent harness engineering for a few days. The argument is one I find myself agreeing with: a coding agent is the model plus everything wrapped around it (prompts, tools, context policies, sandboxes, subagents, hooks, feedback loops), and that scaffolding does more for the agent’s behavior than another model upgrade does. Addy points to data from Viv Trivedy showing that the same model, dropped into a different harness, moved from rank 30 to rank 5 on Terminal Bench 2.0. Once yo
article.title_zh: 為什麼代理框架在雲原生系統內失敗
article.summary_zh: 編碼代理需要完整的框架來提供工具、指導和反饋信號，但在雲原生系統中提供反饋較不直接。

article.title: Fully-functional RTX 3070 16GB gets frankensteined into existence by harvesting dead PCBs and RX 6800 XT's VRAM chips — doubles frame rate in games like Spider Man 2 at 4K and includes switch for 8GB mode
article.summary: A tech enthusiast has combined an Nvidia GeForce RTX 3070 (8GB) with defective memory and an AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT (16GB) with a damaged GPU to make a working RTX 3070 with 16GB of VRAM.
article.title_zh: 完全可用的 RTX 3070 16GB 通過融合損壞 PCB 和 RX 6800 XT 的 VRAM 晶片而誕生 — 在《蜘蛛人 2》4K 遊戲中幀率翻倍，並包含 8GB 模式開關
article.summary_zh: 一位科技愛好者將 Nvidia GeForce RTX 3070（8GB）的缺陷記憶體與 AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT（16GB）的損壞 GPU 相結合，製造出一個具有 16GB VRAM 的可運行 RTX 3070。

article.title: CoreWeave Sandboxes launches to accelerate reinforcement learning, agent tool use and model evaluation
article.summary: Secure, isolated environments for running AI tool use and evaluation at scale. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: CoreWeave Sandboxes 推出以加速強化學習、代理工具使用和模型評估
article.summary_zh: 為大規模運行 AI 工具使用和評估提供安全隔離的環境。

article.title: Strava’s iPhone app now works with Apple’s new AirPods Pro 3 fitness feature
article.summary: Starting today, Strava users can now log workouts and tap into the latest AirPods Pro 3 workout feature. Strava says it works as a standalone AirPods experience or alongside Apple Watch. more…
article.title_zh: Strava 的 iPhone 應用程式現已支援 Apple 新推出的 AirPods Pro 3 健身功能
article.summary_zh: Strava 用戶現可記錄運動並使用最新的 AirPods Pro 3 運動功能，支援獨立使用或搭配 Apple Watch 使用。
